targets.queryText: WITH latest AS (SELECT period_start_date, period_end_date FROM period_summary WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND is_rolling=0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT (strftime('%s', interval_end || ' 00:00:00') * 1000) AS time, mv AS MV, monthly_income AS MoIncome FROM period_intervals WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND period_start_date=(SELECT period_start_date FROM latest) AND period_end_date=(SELECT period_end_date FROM latest) ORDER BY interval_end

targets.queryText: WITH latest AS (SELECT period_start_date, period_end_date FROM period_summary WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND is_rolling=0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT (strftime('%s', interval_end || ' 00:00:00') * 1000) AS time, vol_30d_pct AS Vol30, var_95_1d_pct AS VaR95, cvar_90_1d_pct AS CVaR90 FROM period_intervals WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND period_start_date=(SELECT period_start_date FROM latest) AND period_end_date=(SELECT period_end_date FROM latest) ORDER BY interval_end
targets.rawQueryText: WITH latest AS (SELECT period_start_date, period_end_date FROM period_summary WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND is_rolling=0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT (strftime('%s', interval_end || ' 00:00:00') * 1000) AS time, vol_30d_pct AS Vol30, var_95_1d_pct AS VaR95, cvar_90_1d_pct AS CVaR90 FROM period_intervals WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND period_start_date=(SELECT period_start_date FROM latest) AND period_end_date=(SELECT period_end_date FROM latest) ORDER BY interval_end

targets.queryText: WITH latest AS (SELECT period_start_date, period_end_date FROM period_summary WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND is_rolling=0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1), li AS (SELECT interval_label FROM period_intervals WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND period_start_date=(SELECT period_start_date FROM latest) AND period_end_date=(SELECT period_end_date FROM latest) ORDER BY interval_end DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT substr(symbol,1,8) AS Sym, round(weight_pct,2) AS WtPct, round(market_value,0) AS MV, round(pnl_pct,2) AS PnlPct FROM period_interval_holdings WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND period_start_date=(SELECT period_start_date FROM latest) AND period_end_date=(SELECT period_end_date FROM latest) AND interval_label=(SELECT interval_label FROM li) ORDER BY weight_pct DESC LIMIT 5
targets.rawQueryText: WITH latest AS (SELECT period_start_date, period_end_date FROM period_summary WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND is_rolling=0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1), li AS (SELECT interval_label FROM period_intervals WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND period_start_date=(SELECT period_start_date FROM latest) AND period_end_date=(SELECT period_end_date FROM latest) ORDER BY interval_end DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT substr(symbol,1,8) AS Sym, round(weight_pct,2) AS WtPct, round(market_value,0) AS MV, round(pnl_pct,2) AS PnlPct FROM period_interval_holdings WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND period_start_date=(SELECT period_start_date FROM latest) AND period_end_date=(SELECT period_end_date FROM latest) AND interval_label=(SELECT interval_label FROM li) ORDER BY weight_pct DESC LIMIT 5

targets.queryText: WITH latest AS (SELECT period_start_date, period_end_date FROM period_summary WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND is_rolling=0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1), li AS (SELECT interval_label FROM period_intervals WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND period_start_date=(SELECT period_start_date FROM latest) AND period_end_date=(SELECT period_end_date FROM latest) ORDER BY interval_end DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT window AS Win, round(total_return_pct,2) AS TRPct, round(income_contribution_pct,2) AS IncPct, round(price_contribution_pct,2) AS PricePct FROM period_interval_attribution WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND period_start_date=(SELECT period_start_date FROM latest) AND period_end_date=(SELECT period_end_date FROM latest) AND interval_label=(SELECT interval_label FROM li) ORDER BY CASE window WHEN '1m' THEN 1 WHEN '3m' THEN 2 WHEN '6m' THEN 3 WHEN '12m' THEN 4 ELSE 5 END LIMIT 5
targets.rawQueryText: WITH latest AS (SELECT period_start_date, period_end_date FROM period_summary WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND is_rolling=0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1), li AS (SELECT interval_label FROM period_intervals WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND period_start_date=(SELECT period_start_date FROM latest) AND period_end_date=(SELECT period_end_date FROM latest) ORDER BY interval_end DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT window AS Win, round(total_return_pct,2) AS TRPct, round(income_contribution_pct,2) AS IncPct, round(price_contribution_pct,2) AS PricePct FROM period_interval_attribution WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND period_start_date=(SELECT period_start_date FROM latest) AND period_end_date=(SELECT period_end_date FROM latest) AND interval_label=(SELECT interval_label FROM li) ORDER BY CASE window WHEN '1m' THEN 1 WHEN '3m' THEN 2 WHEN '6m' THEN 3 WHEN '12m' THEN 4 ELSE 5 END LIMIT 5

title: B09 LMI v3 - Period Intervals
description: Interval microstructure board: latest interval state, interval trendline, and attribution snapshot.
